title: Overhead View of Hands Slicing Red Bell Pepper on Wooden Cutting Board with Fresh Vegetables
description: Vertical overhead shot of a kitchen counter featuring hands slicing a red bell pepper on a wooden cutting board. Surrounding the cutting board are bowls filled with fresh vegetables including yellow, orange, and green bell peppers, leafy greens, cherry tomatoes, herbs, garlic cloves, red onions, salt, and black pepper. The scene is lit with bright natural light and set on a neutral kitchen surface, emphasizing healthy plant-based meal preparation.
